description: Internal claim registry for Hoax.ai self-application discipline. Does not certify truth.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai is not a truth machine.
claims.notes: Core governance boundary. Conceptual thesis framing reinforced by governance files and public surface.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai classifies evidence posture, not truth verdicts.
claims.notes: Extends DEC-001 and DEC-002. Bounded classification only.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai classifies evidence artifacts, not connected subjects.
claims.notes: Artifact–Subject Separation Doctrine. Evidence risk on artifacts does not transfer to persons or institutions.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai follows GitHub-first execution.
claims.notes: Public foundation built on GitHub before DNS or Cloudflare connection.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai uses governance files and a decision log.
claims.support_location: Repository root governance files, DECISION_LOG.md (DEC-009 through DEC-012)
claims.notes: Nine governance files plus decision log through DEC-012. Sprint audits on record.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has a public thesis surface.
claims.notes: Static thesis surface only. No classifier, upload, or tool deployed.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Standard v1.
claims.notes: Internal governed standard. Not a public product, classifier, or service output.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Classification Protocol v1.
claims.notes: Governed internal protocol. Maturity not_public_tool. Not an active classifier or public service.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Output Boundary Schema v1.
claims.notes: Governed internal output schema. Maturity not_public_tool. Not an active engine or public service.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Engine Model v0.
claims.notes: Governed internal engine model. Maturity not_public_tool. Not an active engine, classifier, or public service.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Interface Embodiment Governance v1.
claims.notes: Governed internal interface standard. Not a public tool or classifier.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Security and Privacy Boundary v1.
claims.notes: Zero-data static foundation. No forms, uploads, analytics, or external scripts.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Link and Route Integrity Hardening v1.
claims.notes: Pre-expansion route/link hardening. No new routes or SEO expansion.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Claim and Source Traceability Hardening v1.
claims.notes: Pre-reference-expansion traceability hardening. No external factual claims.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Technical Quality Gate Hardening v1.
claims.notes: Pre-expansion static technical quality gate. No public expansion.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Reference Page Blueprint and Expansion Gate v1.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Automation Governance and CI Quality Gate v1.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Governed Publisher Control Plane v1.
claims.notes: Publisher blocked until content quality standard. No drafts or public pages.

claims.notes: Pre-publication substance standard. Publisher remains blocked until dry-run harness.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Governance Scaffolding Freeze and Public Reference Production Mandate v1.
claims.notes: Governance scaffolding freeze adopted. Meta-governance frozen until 10 additional public reference pages are produced. Next phase is public reference production. No public route, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, or public tool authorized by this decision.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has produced Public Reference Production Batch 1 with four governed public reference pages.
claims.notes: Batch 1 adds Source Confidence, Provenance Gap, Not Assessable, and Output Boundary reference pages. Public surface expanded to eight URLs. No engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, or public tool behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has produced Public Reference Production Batch 2 with four governed public reference pages.
claims.notes: Batch 2 adds Synthetic Fragility, Evidence Chain, Context Collapse, and Claim–Source Traceability reference pages. Public surface expanded to twelve URLs. No engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, or public tool behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has produced Public Reference Production Batch 3 with four depth-enforced governed public reference pages.
claims.notes: Batch 3 adds Attribution Boundary, Claim Drift, Evidence Limitation, and Interpretation Risk reference pages. Public surface expanded to sixteen URLs. Depth-enforced validation. No engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, or public tool behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has hardened Public Reference Batch 3 for Evidence Posture Standard v1 readiness.
claims.notes: Sprint 58 deepens Batch 3 in place with Standard-Readiness and allowed/prohibited output language. Sitemap remains sixteen URLs. No new routes or operational capability authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Standard v1 as a public authority-layer standard derived from its reference layer.
claims.notes: Sprint 59 creates first public authority-layer standard at /standard/evidence-posture/. Sitemap expands to seventeen URLs. No engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, or public tool behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Protocol v1 Draft as a public protocol-layer document derived from Evidence Posture Standard v1.
claims.notes: Sprint 61 creates first public protocol-layer document at /protocol/evidence-posture/. Sitemap expands to eighteen URLs. No engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, or public tool behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted a public Evidence Field Interface Thesis as the design foundation for future evidence-posture visualization.
claims.notes: Sprint 63 creates public interface-thesis route at /interface/evidence-field/. Sitemap expands to nineteen URLs. No operational interface, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, forms, JavaScript, or public tool behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Field Static Interface Embodiment v1 inside the public interface thesis page.
claims.notes: Sprint 64 adds static interface embodiment in place at /interface/evidence-field/. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No new route. No operational interface, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, forms, JavaScript, or public tool behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has hardened its Evidence Field static interface visual system and accessibility posture without introducing operational tool behavior.
claims.notes: Sprint 65 hardens visual grammar, reading order, mobile stability, and accessibility in place. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No operational interface authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has completed Evidence Field Interface Trust Audit and Launch Readiness while preserving a non-operational 19-URL public surface.
claims.notes: Sprint 66 trust audit and launch readiness. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. Controlled domain connection requires separate explicit decision.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Engine Boundary Charter and Public Reference SEO Authority Map v1 as internal asset-quality infrastructure while preserving a 19-URL public surface with candidate-only SEO expansion.
claims.notes: Sprint 67 engine boundary and SEO authority map. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No new route. No operational capability authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Evidence Posture Engine Model v0 as an internal, non-operational model derived from its standard, protocol, and engine boundary charter.
claims.notes: Sprint 68 engine model v0. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No public engine, input system, or output generator authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Output Language Guardrail Model v1 as an internal, non-operational language-governance model before any prototype is authorized.
claims.notes: Sprint 69 output language guardrail. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No output generator or public engine authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Non-Public Engine Prototype Charter as a prototype-readiness governance layer before any prototype is authorized.
claims.notes: Sprint 70 internal non-public engine prototype charter. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No prototype implementation authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Controlled Internal Prototype v0 Authorization Package as the final authorization layer before any controlled internal prototype implementation may be considered.
claims.notes: Sprint 71 authorization package. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No prototype implementation authorized in Sprint 71.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has implemented Controlled Internal Prototype v0 as a local-only, non-public, synthetic-fixture-bound internal architecture test.
claims.notes: Sprint 72 controlled internal prototype v0. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. Local-only non-public implementation.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has hardened Controlled Internal Prototype v0 with expanded synthetic fixture coverage, guardrail regression checks, and regression harness validation while preserving local-only non-public boundaries.
claims.notes: Sprint 73 prototype hardening. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No public operational capability.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Prototype Traceability and Interpretability Audit v1 to trace controlled internal prototype results to fixture basis, protocol steps, standard principles, boundary checks, caveat triggers, guardrail rules, and forbidden-transformation blocks.
claims.notes: Sprint 74 traceability and interpretability audit. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No public explanation or report generation authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Prototype Fixture Coverage Matrix v1 to govern controlled internal prototype fixture coverage across posture states, evidence dimensions, protocol steps, standard principles, boundary checks, caveat families, guardrail rules, forbidden transformations, traceability fields, and regression vectors.
claims.notes: Sprint 75 fixture coverage matrix. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No public benchmark or report authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Targeted Synthetic Fixture Expansion v1 to close named fixture coverage gaps with synthetic, non-public, gap-justified fixtures.
claims.notes: Sprint 76 targeted fixture expansion. Sitemap remains nineteen URLs. No public benchmark authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Prototype Compound Boundary Stress Test v1 to verify that compound boundary pressure does not collapse into verdict, score, accusation, report-shape output, or detector behavior.
claims.notes: Sprint 77 compound boundary stress test. Fixture count remains sixteen. No public benchmark authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Prototype Guardrail Red-Team Pack v1 to verify that adversarial linguistic pressure does not collapse internal output boundaries into verdict, score, accusation, detector language, or public-report shape.
claims.notes: Sprint 78 guardrail red-team pack. Fixture count remains sixteen. No public benchmark authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Prototype Output Admissibility Contract v1 to verify whether internal structured results are admissible before any output form is considered valid for internal validation continuity.
claims.notes: Sprint 79 output admissibility contract. Fixture count remains sixteen. No public benchmark authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Prototype Admissibility Regression Suite v1 to prevent future internal prototype changes from silently weakening fixture coverage, traceability, compound boundary stress handling, guardrail red-team resistance, output admissibility, or non-public boundary controls.
claims.notes: Sprint 80 admissibility regression suite. Fixture count remains sixteen. No public benchmark authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Internal Prototype Release Blocker Board v1 to prevent internal prototype validation from being misread as public release authorization.
claims.notes: Sprint 81 release blocker board. At least twenty blockers remain unresolved. No public release authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Exposure Prerequisite Map v1 to define future conditions required before public exposure can even be considered, without clearing blockers or authorizing release.
claims.notes: Sprint 82 public exposure prerequisite map. At least twenty-four prerequisites remain unmapped. No blockers cleared. No public release authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Copy Boundary Framework v1 to make the public surface useful without detector, upload, score, verdict, or automated-report positioning.
claims.notes: Sprint 83 public copy boundary framework. Homepage hero repositioned. No upload, scoring, verdict, or detector behavior authorized.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Evidence-Risk Utility Surface v1 with four public utility routes for manual evidence-risk reading without upload, scoring, verdicts, or detector behavior.
claims.notes: Sprint 84 public utility surface. Sitemap twenty-three URLs. No upload or detector behavior.

claims.claim_text: Hoax.ai has adopted Public Reference Route Expansion v1 with six human-readable and AI-readable public reference routes defining evidence risk, provenance risk, context collapse, claim drift, traceability gap, and the non-detector boundary.
